runs.note: Fixed all security headers per SECURITY_BASELINE.md: X-Frame-Options to DENY, added proper HSTS/XCTO/Cache-Control/Referrer-Policy/Permissions-Policy. Also fixed getTrustedClientIP to only trust X-Forwarded-For from Cloudflare IPs to prevent spoofing.
